summary: Tested new features for expanded exercise library, workout variety, streak tracking, and achievement system. Found critical workout variety issues and frontend form validation problems that block user onboarding.

critical_bugs.issue: Poor workout variety - only 13 unique exercises across 10 days with max repetition of 6 times
critical_bugs.impact: Users experience same exercises repeatedly, confirming original complaint
critical_bugs.details: Variety score 0.26 (needs >0.7), algorithm not properly rotating through 32 available exercises

critical_bugs.issue: Sport-specific exercises appear too frequently (18/20 days instead of every 4-5 days)
critical_bugs.impact: Overwhelming sport-specific focus instead of balanced mix
critical_bugs.details: Current logic includes sport exercises on almost every day rather than periodic inclusion

ui_bugs.issue: Date field validation blocking form submission
ui_bugs.details: Form shows 'Please fill out this field' error even when date appears filled, preventing users from completing onboarding

integration_issues.issue: Cannot test dashboard and workout features due to onboarding form blocking progression
integration_issues.details: Form validation prevents testing of streak display, achievement cards, and workout day functionality

passed_tests: Exercise library expansion (32 exercises with 12 categories)
Required exercises present (push-ups, squats, lunges, hill climbing)
Exercise GIF URLs (100% valid Giphy URLs)
action_item_for_main_agent: 1) Fix workout plan variety algorithm to ensure better exercise rotation and reduce repetition. 2) Adjust sport-specific exercise frequency to appear every 4-5 days instead of almost daily. 3) Fix onboarding form date field validation issue preventing user progression. 4) Test dashboard, streak display, and achievement UI after form fix.
